name: cosmos-bot
description: Cosmos API trading bot — trades Cosmos insider signals through your own Polymarket keys. Your key never leaves your machine.

scripts.check: node --check src/bot.mjs && node --check src/cosmos.mjs && node --check src/polymarket.mjs && node --check src/setup.mjs && node --check src/store.mjs && node --check src/log.mjs && echo ok
